title: Naa Vetta Pora Aadu Lyrics Kadhal 2 Kalyanam Song Lyrics

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Naa Vetta Pora Aadu conveys a playful and energetic vibe about love and celebration, capturing the essence of youthful romance.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Kadhal 2 Kalyanam, this song highlights the joyous moments of the characters as they navigate their relationship, emphasizing fun and excitement.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Roshini and Yuvan Shankar Raja, with music composed by Yuvan himself.

When was the song released?

Naa Vetta Pora Aadu was released on March 19, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naa Vetta Pora Aadu, the characters in Kadhal 2 Kalyanam celebrate their love with a lively and upbeat tune that encapsulates the joy of youthful romance. The playful lyrics and catchy melody evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The song's vibrant energy encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment, reflecting the carefree spirit of love. Overall, it serves as a delightful reminder of the fun and joy that comes with being in love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naa Vetta Pora Aadu from Kadhal 2 Kalyanam is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring the dynamic voices of Roshini and Yuvan Shankar Raja. This catchy duet, infused with Yuvan's signature style, is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the infectious energy and playful lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: I'm going to hunt, what a big deal it is to take a bath. Come to hunt me, this hunting matter is all about this. It's all about marriage, they say it's culture, but they just trap you and take you inside, no need for jail, uncle.
Final countdown, it's just starting here. You better get ready. Freedom is going down, you can't even look at other girls, you have no license for that.
It's all just a show for us. I too have changed from them. In this group, they say living without marriage is wrong.
I'm going to hunt, what a big deal it is to take a bath. Come to hunt me, this hunting matter is all about this.
Bachelor life is not a two-way street. Wherever you want, you can make a U-turn. If there's no marriage, there's no way to turn back, what can I do?
The future is changing, oh yes.. Blood pressure is rising, oh yes.. This is the final game, this is a fun game, in life, marriage is not an option.
I'm going to hunt, what a big deal it is to take a bath. Come to hunt me, this hunting matter is all about this.
In every era, I want to see your face. When I think of you, my heart doesn't feel good. I want to come around you, but if I hit you, it will hurt. I know about you, don't mess with me.
Are you the villain? Oh ho ho. The veena is not playing, oh ho ho. Is this a loss for me too? Overacting, in my life, marriage is not an option.

I'm going to hunt, what a big deal it is to take a bath. Come to hunt me, this hunting matter is all about this. It's all about marriage, they say it's culture, but they just trap you and take you inside, no need for jail, uncle.
Final countdown, it's just starting here. You better get ready. Freedom is going down, you can't even look at other girls, you have no license for that.
